subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my Beloved, my Helper and my Sustainer! How many were the days wherein I heard Thy mention and Thy call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قولی یا الهی و محبوبی و ناصری و معینی کم من یوم فیه سمعت ذکرک و ندآئک و ما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
